claims.summary: Distance and contact should be visible through provenance, reciprocity, porosity, dispersal, and correspondence evidence.
claims.disposition: verify the current read-only witness and bridge evidence surfaces keep these dimensions distinct

claims.summary: Shared witness must preserve silence, refusal, and independent perspectives rather than forcing mutual confirmation.
claims.disposition: verify right-to-ignore, no-response, pending acknowledgement, and dual-perspective phase evidence

claims.summary: Prediction or controller action should be inhibited to create non-instrumental receptivity.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Mike/operator Tier 5 wait because it changes live controller behavior

claims.summary: The system should automatically admit more semantic contact or trickle when distance is high.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Mike/operator Tier 5 wait because it changes semantic admission and live sensory cadence
